title: Remove snap package building and testing
body:
Fixes #4135

While somewhat/barely functional, nobody seems to have the interest or
time to maintain/improve this.  Remove it for now, if in the future
someone has the time/interest, this commit can be reverted.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>
